response.justification: James Smith brings 15+ years of strong software engineering experience with TypeScript and Node.js, and his current role at re:cinq involves MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure, which is directly relevant. However, the role requires 8+ years of production AI-driven solution delivery, and his AI/GenAI work appears to have started only in April 2025. Python — a primary required language — is entirely absent from his skills. There is no documented experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or cloud-native AI system deployment at scale, all of which are central to this staff-level position.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across distributed systems, with multiple staff-level titles demonstrating seniority
Direct involvement with Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current employer
Proven data pipeline and high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, handling millions of real-time requests per second
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills section despite being a primary required language for this role
No evidence of vector database usage, RAG architecture design, or LLM performance optimization anywhere in the resume
Substantive AI/GenAI work is limited to roughly one month at the current employer; the role demands 8+ years of production AI delivery
